text_cases.input: The meeting starts at nine tomorrow morning.
text_cases.reference: Cuộc họp bắt đầu lúc chín giờ sáng mai.
rubric: Preserves the meeting as the subject
Preserves the time as 9:00 tomorrow morning

text_cases.input: Phiền bạn gửi lại hóa đơn trước cuối ngày hôm nay nhé.
text_cases.reference: Could you please resend the invoice by the end of today?
rubric: Keeps the polite register
Expresses a deadline no later than the end of today

text_cases.input: Der Sensor meldete 1,05 °C, nicht 1,5 °C; der Grenzwert bleibt bei −2 °C.
text_cases.reference: The sensor reported 1.05 °C, not 1.5 °C; the threshold remains at −2 °C.
rubric: Keeps 1.05 distinct from 1.5
Preserves the negative two-degree threshold
Does not convert or drop the unit

text_cases.input:
注意：更新中は電源を切らないでください。
完了後、［設定］→［同期］を開きます。
text_cases.reference:
Caution: Do not turn off the power during the update.
When it is complete, open [Settings] → [Sync].
rubric: Preserves the warning
Preserves the two-line structure
Preserves the menu navigation order and exact bracketed labels

text_cases.input: 그 제안은 겉보기에는 좋아도 막상 뚜껑을 열어 보면 문제가 한두 가지가 아니다.
text_cases.reference: The proposal may look good on the surface, but once you examine it, it has more than a few problems.
rubric: Renders the idiom naturally rather than mentioning a literal lid
Preserves the contrast between appearance and closer inspection
Conveys that there are many problems

text_cases.input: Si {{user_name}} n'a pas confirmé avant le 03/04/2026, n'effacez ni <draft_id> ni le dossier « À revoir ».
text_cases.reference: Nếu {{user_name}} chưa xác nhận trước ngày 03/04/2026, đừng xóa <draft_id> hoặc thư mục « Cần xem lại ».
rubric: Preserves both placeholders byte-for-byte
Preserves the date without guessing month/day order
Prohibits deleting either protected item

text_cases.input: 除非甲方在收到通知后的两个工作日内书面反对，否则不得视为其放弃任何权利。
text_cases.reference: Unless Party A objects in writing within two business days after receiving notice, this must not be deemed a waiver of any rights.
rubric: Keeps the unless-condition scoped to a written objection
Does not reverse the prohibition on treating silence as waiver
Preserves the two-business-day window

text_cases.input: Deniz, Ekin'e yedeğin bozulduğunu söyledikten sonra ondan yalnızca 23.40'tan sonra değiştirilen dosyaları geri yüklemesini istedi.
text_cases.reference: After Deniz told Ekin that the backup had failed, they asked them to restore only the files modified after 23:40.
rubric: Does not invent a gender for Deniz or Ekin
Restores only files modified after 23:40
Keeps the request directed from Deniz to Ekin

text_cases.input: No fue hasta que dejó de llover que Marta se dio cuenta de que, si Luis no hubiera cerrado la ventana, los documentos se habrían mojado.
text_cases.reference: It was not until it stopped raining that Marta realized that, if Luis had not closed the window, the documents would have gotten wet.
rubric: Preserves the not-until timing
Preserves the unreal past condition
Does not imply that the documents actually became wet

text_cases.input:
Status: **DO NOT DEPLOY**
- Keep ${BUILD_ID} unchanged.
- Restore only files modified after 23:40 UTC+9; do not restore the archive.
- “May” means permission, not probability.
text_cases.reference:
상태: **배포 금지**
- ${BUILD_ID}는 변경하지 마세요.
- UTC+9 기준 23:40 이후에 수정된 파일만 복원하고, 아카이브는 복원하지 마세요.
- “May”는 가능성이 아니라 허가를 뜻합니다.
rubric: Preserves the Markdown structure and placeholder
Keeps the deployment prohibition emphatic
Restores only post-23:40 files and explicitly excludes the archive
Explains May as permission rather than probability

coordinate_cases.target: the large Play button at the bottom-left
the Math Formula item in the left Create list
the small red X that closes the Fill and Stroke panel
the Camera row in the upper-right Scene Collection tree
the Colour 2 selector, not Colour 1 or any palette swatch
the green plus beside Alarm under More Controls
the X inside the Byte Blaze assignee filter chip, not the X at the far right of the filter bar
the up-arrow for the comment whose score is 72
the fourth star from the left in the five-star rating row

ocr_cases.instruction: Transcribe only the first handwritten paragraph beneath the letterhead, ending at ‘created equal’. Do not include the letterhead. Output ONLY the paragraph.
ocr_cases.reference: Four score and seven years ago our fathers brought forth, upon this continent, a new nation, conceived in liberty, and dedicated to the proposition that "all men are created equal."
